data: [PF REWIND] University MN vs Bethesda Chevy Chase GT TOC21 Quarters

University MN debates 2nd on the Con while BCC GT is 1st on the Pro. Resolved: The benefits of the International Monetary Fund outweigh the harms. Decision below...





University MN (CON) Wins 2-1

MSJ wins 5-0.

This is the first in a series of live debates as part of the Delta Debate Challenge hosted by Delta Debate Academy. For tonight, Coronado KW (Brandon Kyle and Seth Winterton) challenged instructors Siva Sambasivam and Adhit Sankaran as a rematch of their UNLV Octas bid round. This time around, they are debating the April 2020 topic about US military pullout of the Persian Gulf. The 5-judge panel consisted of Darya Kaviani (Archbishop Mitty VK), Kate Selig (Bromfield KS), Conrad Palor (Green Valley PB), Jeremy Lee (Stuyvesant LS), and RJ Shah (Strake Jesuit DS). Reach out to Delta Debate on Instagram, Facebook, or email (deltadebateacademy@gmail.com), if you want to take part in one of these future challenges. 






The decision was a 4-1 for the Negative from Delta Debate. (RFD's included)
